title: Grounds for Lifting a Closure Order. The lifting of the Closure Order may
content: 52 be granted when the person/entity has proven that it is not involved in the illegal 53 recruitment activities, whether directly or indirectly. 54 55 The lifting of the Closure Order shall include the removal of the entity and the names of 56 the persons from the list of persons with derogatory record. The lifting of the Closure 57 Order is, however, without prejudice to the filing of criminal action with the appropriate 58 office against any other person/s alleged to have conducted illegal recruitment activities 59 that led to the issuance of the Closure Order. 60 61 28
